who.title: Who We Are
who.body: MontageSubs is an open, nonprofit community. We bring together filmmakers, subtitle creators, and developers to foster professional collaboration and build a recognized path for fan subtitling.

identities.desc: Find collaborators who truly love your work
Get recognized for the craft you bring
Your tools lower the barrier to participate
Here, every viewer can become a creator

pillars.title: Tools
pillars.desc: We build open-source tools to lower the technical barrier for subtitle creation.

pillars.title: Knowledge
pillars.desc: We document translation notes, technical guides, and best practices — leaving a legacy for those who follow.

pillars.title: Collaboration
pillars.desc: We build formal channels between filmmakers and subtitle creators, so both sides can grow together.

pillars.title: Quality
pillars.desc: We deliver carefully crafted subtitles that audiences can rely on.

meta.title: MontageSubs — Open Subtitle Ecosystem
meta.description: MontageSubs bridges subtitle creators and filmmakers to build an open, transparent subtitle ecosystem. We create tools, document standards, and foster community.
